title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: container-selinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for container-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The container-selinux package provides SELinux policies for container runtimes.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115663)

full_text:
An update for container-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The container-selinux package provides SELinux policies for container runtimes.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update container-selinux package to resolve OCP 4.20 issues [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-115663)
